---
pagetitle: "AMx Architecture — Contact"
lang: fr
---

```{=html}
<header class="hdr">
  <a href="index.html" class="logo">AMx</a>
  <nav class="hdr-nav">
    <a href="conseils.html">Services</a>
  </nav>
  <a href="contact.html" class="hdr-cta" style="background:#27272a;">Contact</a>
</header>

<section class="contact-layout">

  <div class="contact-left">
    <div>
      <h1 class="prest-title">Contact</h1>
    </div>

    <div class="contact-block">
      <div class="step"><span class="step-n">•</span><span class="step-t">Audrey MANGELINCKX</span></div>
      <div class="step"><span class="step-n">•</span><span class="step-t">4000-Liège</span></div>
      <div class="step"><span class="step-n">•</span><a href="mailto:contact@amx-architecture.be" class="step-t" style="color:inherit;text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid currentColor;">contact@amx-architecture.be</a></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-right">
    <form class="contact-form" action="mailto:contact@amx-architecture.be" method="post" enctype="text/plain">

      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="prenom">Prénom</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="text" id="prenom" name="prenom" autocomplete="given-name" placeholder="Marie">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="nom">Nom</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="text" id="nom" name="nom" autocomplete="family-name" placeholder="Dupont">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="email">Email</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="email" id="email" name="email" autocomplete="email" placeholder="marie.dupont@email.com">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="telephone">Téléphone</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="tel" id="telephone" name="telephone" autocomplete="tel" placeholder="+32 470 00 00 00">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="localisation">Localisation du projet</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="text" id="localisation" name="localisation" placeholder="Ex. Liège, Seraing…">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="service">Service concerné</label>
          <select class="form-input form-select" id="service" name="service">
            <option value="" disabled selected>Sélectionnez un service</option>
            <option value="conseils">Conseils en aménagement</option>
            <option value="permis-urbanisme">Permis d'urbanisme</option>
            <option value="permis-regularisation">Permis de régularisation</option>
            <option value="projets-architecture">Projets d'architecture</option>
            <option value="projets-interieur">Projets d'intérieur</option>
            <option value="Autre">Autre</option>

          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label" for="message">Message</label>
        <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" id="message" name="message" rows="6" placeholder="Bonjour, je souhaite vous contacter au sujet d'un projet de rénovation de mon appartement…"></textarea>
      </div>

      <button type="submit" class="hdr-cta form-submit">Envoyer</button>

    </form>
  </div>

</section>

<script>
  document.getElementById('service').addEventListener('change', function() {
    this.classList.add('selected');
  });
</script>

<footer class="ftr">
  <a href="mailto:contact@amx-architecture.be" style="font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#71717a;text-decoration:none;">contact@amx-architecture.be</a>
</footer>
```
